_README: SpaceCraft Planner data — verified against the live game, 2026-06-12. value = base shop sell price (credits). inputs/outputQty/building/category/craftTime/power are the in-game craft recipe. type is a display bucket (raw/refined/component/product). alts = alternate recipes for the same item. Crafting costs power + time (not credits), so craftTax is 0.

hematite.name: Hematite
hematite.desc: A crystalline iron oxide, useful in radiation shielding because of its high density. It is also noted for its electric conductivity.

carbon.name: a-Carbon
carbon.desc: An essential material in most industries, whether in the form of coal, diamond or graphite. It is also one of only six chemical elements found in all known forms of life.

graphite_crystal.name: Graphite Crystal
graphite_crystal.desc: A crystal comprising multiple layers of graphene. Although it could be described as an unfinished diamond, it is cheap enough to be used in pencils.

diamond.name: Diamond
diamond.desc: A crystalline form of pure carbon. It remains the hardest and most thermally conductive material ever observed.

azurite_stone.name: Azurite Stone
azurite_stone.desc: A carbonate crystal mostly made up of copper and often used as a pigment throughout human history.

malachite_stone.name: Malachite Stone
malachite_stone.desc: A carbonate crystal mostly made up of copper and used as a funeral ornament from Ancient Egypt to Mayan Mesoamerica.

quartz.name: Quartz
quartz.desc: A crystal mostly made up of silica, and a major component of many astronomical objects. Its numerous varieties have been traded as gemstones since human antiquity.

sandstone.name: Silicate
sandstone.desc: A sedimentary rock mostly made up of oxidized silicon. A component in glass, ceramics and cement, it is so abundant that terrestrial planets are also known as "silicate planets".

kaolinite.name: Kaolinite
kaolinite.desc: A very common type of silicate mineral, widely used in the production of paper and paint, and often found in clay shells. Safe to ingest in small quantities, it is also a common ingredient in toothpaste.

calcite.name: Calcite
calcite.desc: A carbonate crystal also known as alabaster. As the main component of limestone and marble, it is the ultimate sculpting material.

turquoise.name: Turquoise
turquoise.desc: An opaque gemstone formed by the contact of meteoritic water and copper porphyry.

aquamarine.name: Aquamarine
aquamarine.desc: A crystal of the beryl family, traded as a gemstone and valued for its characteristic light-blue hue.

emerald.name: Emerald
emerald.desc: A crystal of the beryl family, traded as a gemstone and valued for its characteristic dark-green hue.

pyrite.name: Pyrite
pyrite.desc: A crystalline iron sulphide. Cheap enough to be known as "fool's gold", it is nevertheless a useful semiconductor and a common photovoltaic component.

cinnabar.name: Cinnabar
cinnabar.desc: A crystal of mercury sulfide, that was widely used as pigment because of its bright red color, before the high toxicity or mercury was recognized.

sulfur.name: Sulfur
sulfur.desc: A crystalline material, chemical component and fertilizer. Described in the Bible as the brimstone of hell, it is one of only six chemical elements found in all known forms of life.

uranium_nugget.name: Uranium Nugget
uranium_nugget.desc: A dangerous radioactive material that should not be handle without the proper equipement.

crystal.name: Fair Gemstone
crystal.desc: Gemstones can have different compositions, aspects and properties. Their common trait is an aesthetic appeal that makes them valuable to humans.

calcified_invariant.name: Calcified Invariant
calcified_invariant.desc: Ancient stones, bathed in the primordial energies of the big bang, sometimes have an energy signature that makes them uniquely identifiable.

space_wheat_seed.name: Spacekorn Seed
space_wheat_seed.desc: The Spacekorn is a highly adaptable alien organism. Even better, it’s a source of nutrients compatible with human biology.

space_wheat_plain_pulp.name: Plain Pulp
space_wheat_plain_pulp.desc: This pulp is mostly tasteless, despite the unusual nutrient it contains.

space_wheat_sour_pulp.name: Sour Pulp
space_wheat_sour_pulp.desc: This pulp has clearly turned already, and might be a source of fermented compounds.

space_wheat_wooly_korn.name: Wooly Korn
space_wheat_wooly_korn.desc: This hard fibrous shell should contain a few spacekorn seed. A grinder is required to extract them.

space_wheat_frost_pulp.name: Frost Pulp
space_wheat_frost_pulp.desc: Despite its name, this pulp is strangely tepid, as if unaffected by outside temperature.

rockwood_seed.name: Rockwood Nut
rockwood_seed.desc: The Rockwood combines mineral and organic compounds in an unusual way. It often produces complex mineral structures that are rarely found anywhere else in nature.

rockwood_dreamwood_fruit.name: Dream Sporule
rockwood_dreamwood_fruit.desc: Consumption of this fruit is strongly discouraged. Side effects might include: vivid hallucinations, acute paranoia, and sudden death.

rockwood_glowwood_fruit.name: Glowing Nodule
rockwood_glowwood_fruit.desc: This shiny berry is slightly warm to the touch, a sign of latent radioactivity.

rockwood_glowwood_bark.name: Rough Bark
rockwood_glowwood_bark.desc: This dark thick bark has grown in a radioactive environment, but it does not seem to have suffered from it.

water.name: Water
water.desc: As a remarkably neutral solvent with a strong polarity and small molecular size, water is essential to all known lifeforms and most known industries.

water_brine.name: Brine Water
water_brine.desc: Large open body of water under an open sky are contaminated with many compounds, and need to be treated before being used in chemical applications.

ethanol.name: Ethanol
ethanol.desc: While it is well known for its recreative properties, ethanol is also a dense bio-fuel, and an useful solvent for oily stains.

xenic_oil.name: Xenic Oil
xenic_oil.desc: An organic hydrocarbon extracted from alien seeds, xenic oil is an useful lubricant and a mediocre fuel.

thermal_paste.name: Thermal Paste
thermal_paste.desc: This semi-organic paste is unusually resistant to temperature changes. It can be use to protect from extreme condition.

mercury.name: Mercury
mercury.desc: Mercury is the only known metal that is liquid at room temperature. It amalgams with many other metals, and is highly toxic to humans.

vitriol.name: Sulphuric Acid
vitriol.desc: Sulphuric acid is one of the most widely used industrial substances. There are many ways to produce this component, and even more ways to use it.

radon.name: Radon
radon.desc: A dangerous radioactive gaz that should not be handle without the proper equipement.

ftoi_l.name: Mag-Plasma
ftoi_l.desc: The discovery of this remarkable fuel is what made the invention of FTL jumps possible.

bottle_empty.name: Stainless Bottle
bottle_empty.desc: A rudimentary but reliable container for liquid or semi-fluid substances, making it possible to store them in regular cargo holds.

bottle_plasma_empty.name: Confinement Bottle
bottle_plasma_empty.desc: A sturdy mag-plasma container, making it possible to store this substance in regular cargo holds.

iron_ingot.name: Iron Ingot
iron_ingot.desc: A material closely associated with the advent of human civilization. Widely used in industry, it is one of the most abundant elements on terrestrial planets.

graphene.name: Graphene
graphene.desc: A material composed of interlocked carbon atoms. Its unequaled tensile strength makes it an optimal solution when both lightness and solidity are essential.

copper_ingot.name: Copper Ingot
copper_ingot.desc: A highly conductive material noted for its versatility. Occurs in nature as a native metal, but can also be found in crystals.

zirconium_ingot.name: Zirconium Ingot
zirconium_ingot.desc: A material remarkably resistant to corrosion and high temperatures. It is also capable of storing radioactive energy with minimal loss.

titanium_ingot.name: Titanium Ingot
titanium_ingot.desc: A material commonly used in alloys for its lightness, resistance and biocompatibility. It can also be found in most living organisms.

silicium_ingot.name: Silicon Ingot
silicium_ingot.desc: A remarkably balanced semiconductor used in most electronic devices. This metalloid can also be found in clay, glass, and numerous types of stone.

aluminium_ingot.name: Aluminum Ingot
aluminium_ingot.desc: A material noted for its very low density and high conductivity. Though abundant, it seldom appears naturally in pure form.

vanadium_ingot.name: Vanadium Ingot
vanadium_ingot.desc: A material commonly used in steel alloys. It can also be found as a toxin in a number of living organisms.

silver_ingot.name: Silver Ingot
silver_ingot.desc: The most conductive and reflective of all metals. It can be found in its pure form naturally, and has been used in numerous aspects of human industry and art for millennia.

platinum_ingot.name: Platinum Ingot
platinum_ingot.desc: A noble metal of especially high value. Its remarkable resistance to corrosion makes it a prized industrial component.

tungsten_ingot.name: Tungsten Ingot
tungsten_ingot.desc: A dense and hard metal with an exceptionally high melting point, tungsten is difficult to work, but its properties also make it a critical component of many alloys.

steel.name: Steel Ingot
steel.desc: An alloy of iron and carbon, frequently incorporating chromium to prevent oxidation. Its reliability and low cost make it a staple of most industries.

alu_k.name: Alu-K Ingot
alu_k.desc: An alloy of aluminum, with a low weight and an excellent thermal isolation.

btitanium.name: B-Titanium Ingot
btitanium.desc: An alloy of titanium and vanadium, valued for the remarkable formability that makes it an excellent welding material.

levinium.name: Levinium Ingot
levinium.desc: A recently discovered metallic material, noted for its remarkable lightness. Its properties and use cases are still relatively unknown.

unbendinium.name: Unbendinium Ingot
unbendinium.desc: This mysterious alloy has been critical to humankind spacefaring logistics. Its tensile and yield strenghts are unmatched by any other metal known to man.

elmerium.name: Elmerium Core
elmerium.desc: A relatively poorly understood material whose electromagnetic properties can shape plasma fields. Its discovery during the United Planets era sparked the development of FTL shields.

wire.name: Wire
wire.desc: A simple device to transmit electric current between two points.

pipe_1.name: Watertight Pipe
pipe_1.desc: A simple device to move fluids between two points.

coil.name: Magnetic Coil
coil.desc: A simple device converting magnetic fields into electric current, and vice versa.

motor.name: Motor
motor.desc: A device converting electric power into motion, and vice versa.

pump.name: Pump
pump.desc: A device for propelling fluids through connected pipes.

actuator.name: Hydraulic Actuator
actuator.desc: A device that convert fluid pressure into precise, controlled movements.

elmerium_engine.name: Elmerium Engine
elmerium_engine.desc: A device capable of dispersing a plasma field through a spherical volume. An essential component of most Shield models.

focuser.name: Crystalline Focuser
focuser.desc: An optical device to concentrate radiation through polished crystals.

graphenoid.name: Quantic Graphenoid
graphenoid.desc: A graphene structure exhibiting quantum molecular effects, essential to the ability of high-end FTL engines to reach negative mass.

alternator.name: Hall Alternator
alternator.desc: A device capable of producing a strong Hall effect, allowing ion thrusters to accelerate their propellant.

grating.name: Diffraction Grating
grating.desc: An optical device that decomposes light into a spectrum of frequencies.

magnetic_chamber.name: Confinement Chamber
magnetic_chamber.desc: A device allowing plasma current to flow in high-speed circular motion without escaping its trajectory.

metal_bolt.name: Nut and Bolt
metal_bolt.desc: A simple device using twisting force to fasten components together.

metal_sheet_1.name: Metal Sheet
metal_sheet_1.desc: An industrially processed sheet of metal, commonly used as a basic construction material.

mag_sheet.name: Monomagnetic Sheet
mag_sheet.desc: A magnetically polarized sheet of elmerium, commonly used for the inner shells of mag-plasma tanks.

thermal_sheet.name: Thermal Sheet
thermal_sheet.desc: An industrially processed sheet of metal with remarkably low thermal conductivity.

plate_1.name: Stainless Plate
plate_1.desc: A thick metallic panel that can resist harsh weather conditions. Commonly used in outdoor construction or ship hulls.

beam_1.name: Structural Beam
beam_1.desc: An elongated piece of metal with an H-shaped cross-section. Commonly used in construction to provide structural resistance.

solar_cell.name: Solar Cell
solar_cell.desc: An electronic device converting electromagnetic waves into electricity.

silicone_gel.name: Silicone Gel
silicone_gel.desc: A non-reactive, highly absorbent semi-solid, notably used in chemistry, water filtration and cooling.

semiconductor.name: Semiconductor Substrate
semiconductor.desc: A blank page for a future microchip or solar cell.

micro_chip.name: Microchip
micro_chip.desc: An electronic device executing computer programs through a series of simple mathematical operations. Also known as a "Central Processing Unit".

gunpowder.name: Solid Explosive
gunpowder.desc: A chemical compound that deflagrates when heated.

fertilizer_neutral.name: Neutral Fertilizer
fertilizer_neutral.desc: A powdered supplement that can be administered to alien plants to supply them with specific nutrients.

activated_coal.name: Activated Charcoal
activated_coal.desc: A porous form of carbon with outstanding adsorptive properties. Widely used to filter gases and fluids.

carbonic_fuel.name: Carbonic Superfuel
carbonic_fuel.desc: An ultra-processed derivative of carbon, engineered as a more efficient alternative to natural fossil fuels.

battery.name: Chemical Battery
battery.desc: A device that can store chemical energy and convert it to electricity. Forms the basis of larger battery RSMs.

thermal_isolant.name: Thermal Wool
thermal_isolant.desc: A mineral fiber that traps thin layers of air to slow down thermal conduction. Its name evokes the gentle memory of a time when real wool still existed.

antimatter_empty.name: Antimatter Core (empty)
antimatter_empty.desc: A container for holding antiparticles. Notoriously hard to produce, antimatter is even harder to store.

missile_airframe_small.name: Small Missile Airframe
missile_airframe_small.desc: A metal casing and propulsion structure capable of transporting an explosive warhead.

concrete.name: Concrete
concrete.desc: An artificial aggregate of minerals held together by a chemical substance known as cement. Mostly used in construction, concrete was the most manufactured material on Earth.

protein.name: Xenic Protein
protein.desc: An essential component of living organisms, proteins are biomolecules comprising amino acid chains.

lime.name: Lime
lime.desc: A mineral component commonly used in cement and concrete. Obtained by carbonating limestone, it is mostly composed of calcium oxides.

crystal_lattice_m.name: m-Crystal Matrix
crystal_lattice_m.desc: A cleanly cut crystal that can be used in an optical device. Its monoclinic structure is remarkably asymmetrical.

crystal_lattice_h.name: h-Crystal Matrix
crystal_lattice_h.desc: A cleanly cut crystal that can be used in an optical device. Its hexagonal structure is the most commonly found in nature.

crystal_lattice_c.name: c-Crystal Matrix
crystal_lattice_c.desc: A cleanly cut crystal that can be used in an optical device. Its cubic structure is the simplest crystal shape found in nature.

steel_scraps.name: Steel Scraps
steel_scraps.desc: Scraps are the result of industrial disassembly. They cannot be reused without extensive processing at a [B_RecyclingPlant].

building_scraps.name: Industrial Rubble
building_scraps.desc: Rubble is a composite result of industrial disassembly, containing scraps of different metals.

system_scraps.name: Huge Electronics Scraps
system_scraps.desc: Electronic scraps are devices that are damaged beyond repair. They can be dismantled to extract copper and silicon parts.

steel_hull_scraps.name: Wrecked Hull
steel_hull_scraps.desc: Wrecked hulls are ship parts that are damaged beyond repair. They can be dismantled to extract steel, aluminum and copper parts.

module_casing_1.name: Small Module Kit
module_casing_1.desc: A universal standard serving as a basis for all "Reliant Spaceship Modules". Anchors the RSM to its associated ship using B-Switch electropermanent magnets.

support_casing.name: Support Hardware
support_casing.desc: A standardized set of cables and pipes allowing all RSMs to communicate with their associated ship. Follows the "Module Assembly Circulatory System" or MACS convention.

steel_casing_mk_1.name: Small Steel Part Casing
steel_casing_mk_1.desc: A modular hull encasing a ship or an RSM. In addition to limiting friction in atmospheric spaces, the casing provides protection against electromagnetic radiation.

control_base_kit.name: Base Deploy Kit
control_base_kit.desc: This autonomous device can deploy a planetary base in a matter of seconds. Its use is reserved to authorized associates selected by The Company.

control_base_core.name: Base Core Drive
control_base_core.desc: This device can claim the surrounding area for the user's base and supply it with electric power. Its use is reserved to authorized associates selected by The Company.

hull_mk_1_004.name: Steel 4x3x1
hull_mk_1_004.desc: Space crafts are composed of three main layers: a voidproof outside layer, made of resistant material, a structurally sound internal skeleton of heavy beams, and the internal systems keeping the ship inhabitable and functioning. Stellar Engineering brings together all three layers in its modular part designs to help you build the ship of your dreams.

hull_mk_1_001_pla.name: Platinium 4x3x2 [DEPRECATED BUT STILL USED IN SHIPWRECK]

hull_mk_1_002_pla.name: Platinium 6x3x2 [DEPRECATED BUT STILL USED IN SHIPWRECK]

hull_mk_1_003_pla.name: Platinium 8x3x2 [DEPRECATED BUT STILL USED IN SHIPWRECK]

hull_mk_2_001_pla.name: Platinium 8x6x4 [DEPRECATED BUT STILL USED IN SHIPWRECK]

hull_mk_2_002_pla.name: Platinium 12x6x4 [DEPRECATED BUT STILL USED IN SHIPWRECK]

hull_mk_2_003_pla.name: Platinium 16x6x4 [DEPRECATED BUT STILL USED IN SHIPWRECK]

hull_mk_1_006_lev.name: Levinium 8x3x1[DEPRECATED BUT STILL USED IN SHIPWRECK]

hull_mk_1_005_lev.name: Levinium 6x3x1[DEPRECATED BUT STILL USED IN SHIPWRECK]

hull_mk_1_004_lev.name: Levinium 4x3x1 [DEPRECATED BUT STILL USED IN SHIPWRECK]

cockpit_ae_1.name: "Pathfinder" Cockpit
cockpit_ae_1.desc: Aegir's individual cockpit is streamlined to reduce the probability of critical damage during FTL jumps. It also comes with a small but highly efficient power battery.

cockpit_ae_2.name: "Wanderback" Cockpit
cockpit_ae_2.desc: Aegir's large size cockpit is a technological wonder, capable of saving a precise location to which it can jump back at any time with no mag-plasma use and no risk of damage.

cockpit_tc_1.name: "Brick" Cockpit
cockpit_tc_1.desc: The Company's entry-level cockpit, mostly equipped on test vehicles.

cockpit_mk_1.name: "Beaver" Cockpit
cockpit_mk_1.desc: Meitner & Karls' individual cockpit is optimized for storage space and collision resistance, making it the perfect pick for transporting cargo through asteroid fields.

cockpit_mk_2.name: "Anvil" Cockpit
cockpit_mk_2.desc: Meitner & Karls' large size cockpit is massive enough to include an onboard smelter, similar to the ones you could build in a land base.

cockpit_da_1.name: "Cocoon" Cockpit
cockpit_da_1.desc: Damona's individual cockpit is a feat of insulation engineering that makes it less vulnerable to outside temperatures, but also slows down laser cooling. It also comes with a small radiator to help the ship evacuate excess heat or generate some when it gets cold.

cockpit_da_2.name: "Reality" Cockpit
cockpit_da_2.desc: [TODO] I don't know the effect, nor the name of this one

deco_01.name: Round Hatch
deco_01.desc: This security joint covering an opening of the spaceship can also have some ornamental value. In the absence of wheels, it serves as a decorative rim.

light_01.name: Spot Light
light_01.desc: A good light, used to open a path of vision in the darkness.

thruster_0.name: "Cart Pusher" Thruster
thruster_0.desc: This electric propulsion device can provide thrust and lift to a spaceship without requiring any combustion or non-renewable fuel.

thruster_ae_1.name: "Quiet Breeze" Thruster
thruster_ae_1.desc: This subtle AEgir thruster integrates deeply with the ship's system to reach both summits of power efficiency and uncharted darkness.

thruster_mk_1.name: "Grasshopper" Thruster
thruster_mk_1.desc: Meitner & Karls have designed this powerful thruster to deal with the dry heat of the most instense mining trip.

thruster_da_1.name: "Voidseeker" Thruster
thruster_da_1.desc: Science often brings the inquisitive minds beyond the edge of safety. With this thruster, Damona gives them a way to return promptly to the secured emptyness of space.

storage_1.name: Small Cargo Hold
storage_1.desc: This storage module is suitable for solid materials. Its magnetic stabilization system protects its load from collisions, regardless of the ship's movements.

liquid_storage_1.name: Small Liquid Tank
liquid_storage_1.desc: This storage module is suitable for liquid or semi-fluid materials. Its MACS connections allow it to supply other RSMs if it contains fuel or cooling fluid.

pressure_storage_1.name: Small Pressure Chamber
pressure_storage_1.desc: This storage module is suitable for liquid gas requiring extreme pressurization. Its MACS connections allow it to supply other RSMs if it contains fuel or cooling fluid.

ftlengine_1.name: FTL Engine - Eco
ftlengine_1.desc: Regarded as the greatest invention of the United Planets era, this category of modules can contract and expand space, making faster-than-light travel possible.

ftlengine_3_solo.name: Advanced FTL Engine - Solo
ftlengine_3_solo.desc: Regarded as the greatest invention of the United Planets era, this category of modules can contract and expand space, making faster-than-light travel possible. This model is optimized for a single ship.

ftlengine_3_support.name: Advanced FTL Engine - Support
ftlengine_3_support.desc: Regarded as the greatest invention of the *United Planets* era, this category of modules can contract and expand space, making faster-than-light travel possible. This model can transport several ships at once.

ftltank_1.name: Small Mag-Plasma Tank
ftltank_1.desc: This storage module is suitable for active mag-plasma. Its MACS connections enable it to supply shield RSMs.

navigator.name: Cosmic Navigator
navigator.desc: This module use complex algorithms and precise spatial coordinates to help the distracted contractor plan a route across the stars.

battery_1.name: Battery Module
battery_1.desc: This module can store chemical energy and readily convert it to electric current to power other RSMs.

rbattery_0.name: Flywheel Battery
rbattery_0.desc: This module can store kinetic energy with a rotating wheel to power other RSMs while avoiding the disadvantages of chemical batteries.

pbattery.name: Paradoxical Battery
pbattery.desc: [NOT IMPL] A Battery that load fully when jumping in FTL (and cannot reload in any other way). Is consumed before any other battery.

isotopic_generator.name: Isotopic Generator
isotopic_generator.desc: [NOT IMPL] Produce Power but do not require anything (not even light !!!)

fusion_generator.name: Fusion Generator
fusion_generator.desc: [NOT IMPL] Produce Power and consume hydrogen or something

power_sharer_ph.name: Power Projector
power_sharer_ph.desc: [NOT IMPL] Act as a hub for every ship in the group to share power (from low battery to high battery)

nitrogenerator.name: LR Nitrogenerator
nitrogenerator.desc: [NOT IMPL] gives a skill usable in and out of combat that consumes hydrogen capsule, to produce a lot of power for a short time (with a long cooldown)

carbon_generator.name: Small Fuel Generator
carbon_generator.desc: This module consumes carbon-based fuel to produce electric current to power other RSMs.

heater.name: Electric Heater
heater.desc: A heater is used to combat the harsh cold exterior by turning electrical power into raw heat.

heat_recouper.name: Heat Condenser
heat_recouper.desc: [NOT IMPL] Turn heat into power slowly and increase heat capacity alot

kinetic_shield_1.name: Small Reactive Shield
kinetic_shield_1.desc: Using a pair of Tesla coils, this module generates a bubble of charged plasma that can protect a spaceship from radiation and particles.

barrier_shield_1.name: Small Barrier Shield
barrier_shield_1.desc: This plasma shield module has enough charge to protect a spaceship from light man-made weapons, but takes longer to load than regular shields.

heavy_shield_2.name: Heavy Shield
heavy_shield_2.desc: [NOT IMPL A heavy combat shield, that ignores light damage, at an increased energy cost.]

kinetic_shield_group.name: Kinetic Shield Projector
kinetic_shield_group.desc: [NOT IMPL] Generate shield for all ships in the group at relatively close proximity.

heat_shield.name: Thermal Shield
heat_shield.desc: [NOT IMPL] Improve the shield of the ship, so that, as long as it is active, the ship also benefit from a protection from environmental heat and cold (reduction of the heat interface), and from heat-related weapons

mag_shield.name: Magnetokinetic Shield Generator
mag_shield.desc: [NOT IMPL] Shield that negate 30% of damage received and turn it into power for the ship. If there are no batteries to hold that power, the excedent power gain is turned back into damage that affect directly the hull.

stealth_module_personnal.name: Stealth Micro-Projector
stealth_module_personnal.desc: [NOT IMPL] Tool that makes it more difficult to detect the ship (both for PC and NPC) (Consume Antimatter Core)

stealth_module_group.name: Stealth Macro-Projector
stealth_module_group.desc: [NOT IMPL] Tool that makes it more difficult to detect the ship (both for PC and NPC) and friendly ships around (Consume Antimatter Core)

auto_boost_module.name: Booster Control Mod
auto_boost_module.desc: This small piece of computer improves the control of the thrusters: tap [key.Booster] to toggle the boost.

auto_mine_module.name: Mining Laser Control Mod
auto_mine_module.desc: This small piece of computer improves the control of the mining laser: tap [key.Mine] to toggle the mining skill.

engine_booster.name: LR "Speedster"
engine_booster.desc: Luo Ri's entry level auxiliary engine module can give a substantial speed advantage to pilots on a budget.

solar_panel_1.name: Small Solar Panel
solar_panel_1.desc: This module converts electromagnetic radiation into electric current to power other RSMs.

radiator.name: Small Radiator
radiator.desc: This module can release large quantities of thermal energy. It is mostly used to cool off a spaceship’s interior by dispersing its heat into space.

radar_0.name: Crude Resource Detector
radar_0.desc: By emitting electromagnetic waves and interpreting their refraction, this radar can detect and identify metallic objects within a large perimeter.

radar_sniffer.name: Mimetic Detector
radar_sniffer.desc: Using a sample of a determined resource, this detector can locate nearby deposits containing the same element.

radar_smart.name: Spectral Resource Detector
radar_smart.desc: Using spectral analysis and comparison with a database of components, this detector can identify known resources from afar.

gravite_detector.name: Gravitron
gravite_detector.desc: This specialized detector can locate gravite stones with precision. It greatly differs from other detectors, which can locate pretty much everything except gravite.

scanner_0.name: Scanalyzer Alpha
scanner_0.desc: This module identifies the composition of a sample via mass spectrometry. Mining lasers can only be used on resources that were identified through this process.

mining_tool_1.name: Simple Mining Laser
mining_tool_1.desc: This optical module amplifies light to an intensity that can vaporise many materials. It is currently the most precise way to cut through things.

mining_tool_cold.name: Cooling Laser
mining_tool_cold.desc: This high-pressure stream of liquefied gas provides an alternative to laser beams, with the opposite effect on the target's temperature. The two can be used in combination.

fluid_pumping_tool_1.name: Simple Hose Pump
fluid_pumping_tool_1.desc: A module designed to gather all kinds of fluid present in the environnement, through a powerful suction.

exploding_tool_mk_1.name: Single-Tube Missile Launcher
exploding_tool_mk_1.desc: A module used to deliver a single explosive payload to a remote target.

pathway_puncher.name: Spacetime Puncher
pathway_puncher.desc: A module that bores a tiny hole in the spacetime continuum. This allows the deployment of a [PathwayAmmo] that will dig a pathway toward an existing [B_PathwayHolder].

seeker_missile_0.name: Seeker Missile
seeker_missile_0.desc: Before the exode, simple chemical explosives were a commonplace weapon. More destructive options exist, but none are as cheap and easy to produce.

blast_missile_0.name: Blasting Missile
blast_missile_0.desc: Explosives are often used in mining operations to access minerals protected by heavy surface materials.

beacon.name: Quantum Beacon
beacon.desc: An experimental method of high-speed communication. This beacon can instantly reveal its position to a quantum signature across the galaxy, no matter where it is.

pathway_ammo.name: Pathway Kernel
pathway_ammo.desc: Used with a [PathwayPuncher], this kernel can bore a pathway to any available [B_PathwayHolder]. Such a Pathway can then be used to travel between two locations with a regular FTL engine.

hypergate_beacon.name: Hypergate Beacon
hypergate_beacon.desc: [NOT IMPL] Exit point for a Hypergate tunnel.

locked_capsule.name: Personal Capsule
locked_capsule.desc: [NOT IMPL] A capsule whose access is configurable.

cartridge_iron.name: Small Cartridge
cartridge_iron.desc: Projectile weapons are still used extensively by the Universal Defense Corps, which developed an array of standards for cartridge calibers.

p_construction_tool.name: Construction Tool
p_construction_tool.desc: "Blueprint Synthesis" releases a cloud of hovering nanobots that can recognize, cut and assemble materials based on a predefined pattern. In short, it builds stuff.

p_dismentling_tool.name: Construction Tool 2.0
p_dismentling_tool.desc: This improved tool includes the "Material De-Synthesis" feature, which can reverse a finished construction process and retrieve some of the components involved.

p_moving_tool.name: Construction Tool 3.0
p_moving_tool.desc: This improved tool includes the "Continuous Integrity" feature, which can relocate a building within a base without dismantling it first.

p_farming_tool.name: Farming Tool
p_farming_tool.desc: Putting a dirty seed to soak might seem like a mundane task, but this tool sublimates the art of positioning a germinating piece of alien plant at the perfect place for the success of its developpement.

p_critter_pheromon.name: Pheromone Mix
p_critter_pheromon.desc: [NOT IMPL a grenade that attracts Critters where it lands for a while]

p_thermo_suit.name: Thermo Suit Chip
p_thermo_suit.desc: This accessory increases a suit's insulation capacity against both high and low temperatures. Multiple chips can be applied for increased efficiency.

p_heat_suit.name: Heat-Protec Suit Chip
p_heat_suit.desc: This accessory increases a suit's insulation capacity against high temperatures. Multiple chips can be applied for increased efficiency.

p_cold_suit.name: Cold-Protec Suit Chip
p_cold_suit.desc: This accessory increases a suit's insulation capacity against low temperatures. Multiple chips can be applied for increased efficiency.

p_rad_suit.name: Rad Suit Chip
p_rad_suit.desc: This accessory increases a suit's insulation capacity against radiation. Multiple chips can be applied for increased efficiency.

access_corpo_1.name: CPAF Pass (Test Subject)
access_corpo_1.desc: Grants access to the next room.

access_corpo_2.name: CPAF Pass (Designer)
access_corpo_2.desc: Grants access to the designers’ offices.

access_warehouse.name: Warehouse Pass
access_warehouse.desc: Grants access to the monitoring office in the warehouse.

access_prospecting.name: Prospecting Hub Pass
access_prospecting.desc: Grants access to the mining bureau's vault.

access_mine_1.name: Administrative Quarter Pass
access_mine_1.desc: Grants access to the mine's offices.

access_mine_2.name: Elevator Pass
access_mine_2.desc: Grants access to the mine's civilian elevator.

access_lab_monsters.name: Janitor Pass
access_lab_monsters.desc: Grants access to all areas of the testing facility.

access_dark_2.name: [TODO] Director Pass
access_dark_2.desc: [TODO] Grants access to the director office.

drone_0.name: Drone
drone_0.desc: This autonomous vehicle carries loads from one point to another along a predefined route.

shuttle_0.name: Shuttle
shuttle_0.desc: This autonomous vehicle carries loads into and out of the base, transporting them to or from other bases.

pshuttle.name: Power Shuttle
pshuttle.desc: [NOT IMPL shuttle but transport power instead of goods

b_control_base.name: Base Command Center
b_control_base.desc: This central building provides the basic storage, electric power and administrative systems needed to operate a small land base. Deploying a base constitutes a legal claim over the area and deposits it is placed over. It also comes with basic manual smelting and crafting machines.

b_control_base_2.name: Command Tower
b_control_base_2.desc: This building allows a base to expand over a Level 2 land area, doubling its maximum footprint and unlocking experience thresholds up to 800 points.

b_control_base_3_ph.name: Command Relay
b_control_base_3_ph.desc: This building allows a base to expand over a Level 3 land area, doubling its maximum footprint and unlocking experience thresholds up to 2000 points.

b_control_base_corpo_1.name: Corporation Command Center
b_control_base_corpo_1.desc: A legally sanctionned corporation of importance often requires a place to centralized its operation. This building increases the maximum size of a single base of the corporation and contains crafting machines, a conference room, and many customizable space.

b_extractor.name: Extractor
b_extractor.desc: This building can only be assembled over a resource deposit, which it will then drill into to extract raw ore automatically.

b_liquid_extractor.name: Liquid Extractor
b_liquid_extractor.desc: This building can only be assembled over a geothermal pool, from which it will extract pure fluid automatically.

b_solar_panel.name: Solar Plant
b_solar_panel.desc: This building converts electromagnetic radiation into electric current, supplying the base's power grid. It takes up space and must be oriented correctly, but it operates without fuel.

b_warehouse.name: Warehouse
b_warehouse.desc: This building is suitable for storing solid materials, which can be easily moved in and out by drones.

b_organiser.name: Drone Dispatcher
b_organiser.desc: This building can monitor multiple drone routes and merge them into full-fledged production chains. The backbone of a well-organized pipeline.

b_chest.name: Trading Box
b_chest.desc: This small box let anyone from the same corporation than the base owner leave, or take, gifts.

b_cistern.name: Cistern
b_cistern.desc: This building is suitable for storing liquid or semi-fluid materials.

b_ftlcistern.name: Mag-Plasma Cistern
b_ftlcistern.desc: This building is suitable for storing active mag-plasma.

b_ftlgatherer.name: Cosmic Condenser
b_ftlgatherer.desc: [NOT IMPL] Building that produce mag-plasma slowly, based on some local properties (maybe proximity from other condensator, and space station reduce production)

b_crystaliser.name: Crystallizer
b_crystaliser.desc: This building uses chemical solutions to generate crystals at exceptionally high speeds compared to their natural formation process.

b_farm.name: Xenic Farm
b_farm.desc: This building provides an appropriate environment to cultivate living organisms.

b_antimatter_synth_ph.name: Antimatter Synthesizer
b_antimatter_synth_ph.desc: This building consumes huge amounts of electricity to produce trace amounts of antimatter, which is still rather remarkable.

b_labo_ph.name: Laboratory
b_labo_ph.desc: This building contains a compact Ninmah laboratory with everything needed to analyze exotic substances.

b_connector.name: Cable
b_connector.desc: This simple cable composes the electricty grid that power every settlement in the Atlas galaxy.

b_electric_pillar.name: Pylon
b_electric_pillar.desc: This pole can support electric cables and connect the base's power grid to another building. To plug a cable into it, target the top of the pylon and press E.

b_generator.name: Fuel Power Plant
b_generator.desc: This building consumes carbon-based fuel to produce electric current, supplying the base's power grid. It is effective and compact, but resource-intensive.

b_heat_recouper.name: Heat Capacitor
b_heat_recouper.desc: [NOT IMPL] reduce temperature around the base. Produce power based on current temperature

b_power_transmitter.name: Power Transmitter
b_power_transmitter.desc: This building exploits cutting-edge shield technology and gravitational spacetime deformation to beam electricity without loss between different bases in the same stellar system.

b_battery.name: Battery Array
b_battery.desc: This building stores chemical energy when the power grid produces excess power. It can then readily convert that energy back to electricity during spikes in consumption.

b_factory_1.name: Assembler
b_factory_1.desc: This building assembles basic resources into industrial compounds. As an automated alternative to the manual workshop, it can function continuously with no human input, which makes it appropriate for large-scale production.

b_factory_2.name: Factory
b_factory_2.desc: The biggest ship materials can only be built in a custom large-scale factory that consumes a lot of energy.

b_smelter.name: Smelter
b_smelter.desc: This building converts raw ore into industrial ingots. As an automated alternative to the manual smelter, it can function continuously with no human input, which makes it appropriate for large-scale production.

b_smelter_sa.name: Micro-Furnace
b_smelter_sa.desc: Meitner & Karls have refined the process of turning ore into ingots with this micro-furnace. Smaller and faster than a regular smelter, it's the perfect accessory for your days of heavy manual crafting.

b_chemical.name: Chemical Factory
b_chemical.desc: This building assembles chemical elements into industrial compounds. It can function continuously with no human input, which makes it appropriate for large-scale production.

b_bottling_plant.name: Bottling Plant
b_bottling_plant.desc: This building packages liquid or semi-fluid products into standardized containers.

b_recycling_plant.name: Recycling Plant
b_recycling_plant.desc: This building processes scraps to extract their various components and prepare them for industrial reuse.

b_shuttle_pad.name: Shuttle Landing Pad
b_shuttle_pad.desc: This platform allows a shuttle to dock on the base, transporting goods into and out of it.

b_landing_pad.name: Landing Pad
b_landing_pad.desc: This platform allows a ship to dock on the base and connect to its distribution system to transfer fuel or other fluids.

b_shipyard.name: Shipyard
b_shipyard.desc: This platform allows a ship to dock on the base to have its structure modified and its modules replaced. It is similar to the shipyards of space stations.

b_pathway_holder.name: Pathway Stand
b_pathway_holder.desc: This towering structure can keep an existing spacetime tunnel stable, even in the gravitational well of a planet. A ship can travel through such a pathway with their regular FTL engine. Requires the deployment of a [PathwayAmmo] with a [PathwayPuncher] at the exit point.

b_atmo_dome.name: Atmo-dome Generator
b_atmo_dome.desc: [NOT IMPL] Building that reduces or negates entirely weather pattern and environmental stuff around the base and in a tube above it, up to space, allowing ship that are not equipped for it to interact with the base.

b_observatory.name: Observatory
b_observatory.desc: [NOT IMPL] Building that allow either the owner or its corporation to see invisible FTL pathways and remove the required level to use an FTL pathway, up to a certain range.

b_hypergate.name: Hypergate
b_hypergate.desc: [NOT IMPL] Building that allows the creation of a tunnel toward a hypergate beacon from the same corporation. Consume a lot of power.

b_sun_station.name: Sun Station
b_sun_station.desc: [NOT IMPL] Space Building that produce a huge amount of power from a nearby star. Damage itself when its batteries are full.

b_deco_test.name: Test deco
b_deco_test.desc: This building is only a decoration, but style is often the difference between good contractors and great ones.

b_deco_pirate.name: Pirate Hologram
b_deco_pirate.desc: This building is only a decoration, but style is often the difference between good contractors and great ones.

b_deco_transcendance.name: Transcendance Hologram
b_deco_transcendance.desc: This building is only a decoration, but style is often the difference between good contractors and great ones.

b_deco_planet.name: Planet Hologram
b_deco_planet.desc: This building is only a decoration, but style is often the difference between good contractors and great ones.

b_deco_sakura.name: Sakura Hologram
b_deco_sakura.desc: This building is only a decoration, but style is often the difference between good contractors and great ones.

b_deco_snake.name: Snake Hologram
b_deco_snake.desc: This building is only a decoration, but style is often the difference between good contractors and great ones.

b_deco_diver.name: Diver Hologram
b_deco_diver.desc: This building is only a decoration, but style is often the difference between good contractors and great ones.
